description: Dogwifhat (WIF) emerged on Solana in 2023 as a viral Shiba Inu memecoin wearing a knitted hat, rising through humor, culture, and massive community power. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031 second block time — ATC-20 WIF offers instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fees, and full AI contract capability, bringing WIF into a much faster, safer, and commercially scalable future across Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Dogwifhat
